[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 00000011 2
2 01010000 2
3 10001100 3
4 01000001 2
5 00010011 3
6 01010100 3
7 00000000 a

01 10 01000011 3
12 21 01010011 4
23 32 01000001 2 match 4
34 43 00000001 1 match 0
45 54 00010000 1
56 65 00000100 1
67 76 10000000 1
70 07 00000001 1 match 0

02 20 01001111 5
13 31 01000001 2 match 4
24 42 00010011 3 match 5
35 53 01000000 1
46 64 00000000 a match 7
57 75 00000000 a match 7
60 06 00001100 2
71 17 00000001 1 match 0

03 30 01000001 2 match 4
14 41 00010011 3 match 5
25 52 01010100 3 match 6
36 63 00000000 a match 7
47 74 00000001 1 match 0
50 05 01000100 2
61 16 00000000 a match 7
72 27 10000001 2

04 40 00000011 2 match 1
15 51 01010000 2 match 2
26 62 10001100 3 match 3
37 73 00000001 1 match 0
[completion]
